author: ringeringeraja33
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A node-based writing tool for game development, interactive fiction, branching scripts, quest chains, and other nonlinear narrative structures.

manifest.author: ringeringeraja33
manifest.description: A node-based writing workspace for planning complex narratives, branching stories, and game plots.
manifest.name: Narrative Canvas

name: Narrative Canvas

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
﻿# Narrative Canvas 1.0.6

1.0.6 is a hotfix for the 1.0.5 release.

[README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)

## Fixes

- Fixed plugin CSS generation so scoped `@media` rules are valid in `styles.css`.
- Reworked the Characters masonry layout to avoid Obsidian's partially supported multicolumn CSS warning.
- Removed `!important` usage reported by the CSS lint check.
- Avoided full-vault file enumeration in the Obsidian project picker.
- Avoided browser storage API references in the Obsidian plugin release bundle.

## Release Assets

The Obsidian plugin release still includes only:

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.6

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
﻿# Narrative Canvas 1.0.5

[README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)

## English

Compared with `1.0.4`, this release mainly fixes canvas editing, node linking, Obsidian plugin compatibility, and the Story / Events / Characters workflows.

### Canvas

- Fixed node connection ports so links can be created between nodes again.
- Adjusted connection port styling and positioning so ports follow node edges after resizing.
- Choice branch links now keep visible labels and branch metadata, making it clear which option leads to which next node.
- Single-clicking a node focuses it and zooms the canvas to `100%`.
- Double-clicking a node focuses it, zooms the canvas to `100%`, and opens inline editing.
- While editing a node, clicking inside the current node no longer exits edit mode; clicking outside the node exits edit mode.
- Adjusted default node width and improved text wrapping to reduce sample content overflowing outside frames.
- Fixed black image export output.
- Image export now includes nodes and links outside the current viewport, with safer scaling for large canvases.
- Removed the `Layout H`, `Layout V`, and HTML export buttons.

### Story And Frame

- In Story, a node belongs to a Frame when the node center point is inside that Frame.
- If a node center point is inside multiple Frames, it belongs to the smallest containing Frame.
- Frame folding and nesting rules avoid circular containment.
- Dragging nodes / Frames in the Story page writes layout changes back to the canvas.
- The README Story section now documents Frame containment, folding rules, and the relationship between Story display and Canvas operations.

### Events Sheet

- Fixed unclickable buttons in an empty Events Sheet.
- Fixed cramped table text and columns after adding a new event frame.
- Events Sheet columns can be resized by dragging, and their widths are preserved after releasing the mouse.
- Renaming, hiding, showing, or deleting columns no longer refreshes the entire canvas.
- Hidden columns are listed in the right-side `Hidden` area.
- Search bars are now consistently placed in the bottom status bar.

### Characters

- Typing `@` in node text now opens a character suggestion dropdown.
- When there are many characters, the dropdown has a max height and scrolls.
- Fixed the leftover line after selecting a character from the dropdown.
- New projects no longer include sample characters.
- All characters can now be deleted.
- The Characters page now uses a masonry layout to avoid large empty gaps caused by strict row alignment.

### Playbook

- New projects no longer include a default empty variable.
- All variables can now be deleted.
- Fixed add / delete behavior after all variables have been deleted.
- Invalid JSON in Advanced JSON now shows an error instead of breaking the editor.

### Obsidian Plugin

- Fixed timers continuing to access cleared DOM after closing the plugin view.
- Fixed stale project state remaining after reopening the plugin view.
- Removed outdated base64 fallback resources.
- Removed dynamic execution through `new Function`.
- Removed native `prompt` / `confirm` dialogs and replaced them with in-app dialogs.
- Plugin CSS is now more tightly scoped to avoid affecting Obsidian’s file tree and workspace styles.

### UI And Storage

- Undo / redo buttons were moved to the app header instead of floating only over the canvas.
- `Ctrl+Z` / `Ctrl+Y` now work across more editing pages.
- Browser storage wording is clearer, making it easier to distinguish browser-local saving from file saving.
- The new project filename template description in Settings was simplified to show only the available placeholders.
- Sidebar and file-list class names were cleaned up to reduce conflicts with Obsidian themes.

## 中文

相对 `1.0.4`，这个版本主要修复画布编辑、节点连线、Obsidian 插件端兼容以及 Story / Events / Characters 的工作流问题。

### Canvas 画布

- 修复节点连接点，节点之间可以重新拉出新连线。
- 调整连接点样式和位置，节点缩放后连接点会跟随边框。
- Choice 分支连线会保留可见 label 和分支信息，能看清每个选项通向哪个节点。
- 单击节点：focus 节点并缩放到 `100%`。
- 双击节点：focus 节点、缩放到 `100%`，并直接进入节点内编辑。
- 编辑节点时，点击当前节点内部不会退出编辑；点击节点外才会退出。
- 调整默认节点宽度，优化文本换行，减少 sample 中节点内容超出 frame 的情况。
- 修复图片导出黑屏问题。
- 图片导出现在能包含当前视口外的节点和连线，并对大画布做了安全缩放限制。
- 移除了 `Layout H`、`Layout V` 和 HTML 导出按钮。

### Story 与 Frame

- Story 中判断节点是否属于某个 Frame：以节点中心点为准。
- 如果一个节点中心点落在多个 Frame 内，归入最小的那个 Frame。
- Frame 折叠和嵌套规则避免循环包含。
- Story 页拖动节点 / Frame 会写回 canvas 布局。
- README 的 Story 部分补充了 Frame 包含规则、折叠规则，以及 Story 显示和 Canvas 操作之间的关系。

### Events Sheet

- 修复空 Events Sheet 下按钮点不了的问题。
- 修复新增 event frame 后表格文字和列挤在一起的问题。
- Events Sheet 列宽可以拖拽调整，松开鼠标后会保留宽度。
- 修改列名、隐藏列、显示列、删除列时不再刷新整个 canvas。
- 隐藏列统一显示在右侧 `Hidden` 区域。
- 搜索栏位置统一到底部状态栏。

### Characters 角色页

- 节点文本中输入 `@` 会弹出角色下拉选择框。
- 角色很多时，下拉框有高度上限和滚动条。
- 修复选择角色后下拉框残留横杠的问题。
- 新建项目不再自带示例角色。
- 允许删光所有角色。
- 角色页改为瀑布流布局，避免严格按行排列造成大量空白。

### Playbook

- 新建项目不再自带默认空 variable。
- 允许删光所有 variables。
- 修复删光 variables 后再次新增 / 删除时可能失效的问题。
- Advanced JSON 输入非法 JSON 时会给出错误提示，不会直接把编辑器弄坏。

### Obsidian 插件端

- 修复关闭视图后定时器继续访问已清空 DOM 的问题。
- 修复重新打开插件视图时残留上一次项目状态的问题。
- 移除过期的 base64 fallback 资源。
- 移除 `new Function` 动态执行。
- 移除原生 `prompt` / `confirm`，改为应用内对话框。
- 插件 CSS 做了更严格的作用域隔离，避免影响 Obsidian 左侧文件树和工作区样式。

### UI 与存储

- 撤销 / 重做按钮移动到应用顶部区域，不再只悬浮在 canvas 上。
- `Ctrl+Z` / `Ctrl+Y` 可用于更多编辑页面。
- 网页端 Browser storage 文案更清楚，便于区分本地浏览器保存和文件保存。
- 设置页的新项目文件名模板说明已简化，只保留可用 placeholder。
- 侧栏和文件列表 class 命名清理，减少和 Obsidian 主题冲突。
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.5

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
## English

- Fixes plugin-side search and form controls by isolating workspace/search class names and keeping Obsidian host events from swallowing input focus.
- Adds resizable, collapsible left and right sidebars with Obsidian-style icon toggles, saved UI state, and minimum widths that keep labels from wrapping.

## 中文

- 修复插件端搜索框和表单控件点不了的问题：隔离 workspace/search 类名，并阻止 Obsidian 宿主事件吞掉输入焦点。
- 左右栏支持拖拽伸缩和折叠，使用接近 Obsidian 原生的图标按钮；栏宽状态会保存，并限制最低宽度，避免文字被挤到换行。

[README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.4

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
## English

- Improves the canvas right-click menu so it closes after menu actions, outside clicks, Escape, or window focus changes in the Obsidian runtime.
- Removes the broken filename-token dropdown from settings and shows the available tokens as static text.
- Aligns Events Sheet search and action controls with the Characters page layout.
- Renames the fixed whiteboard entry from `Sample.canvas` to `Narrative.canvas` and clarifies that it does not track the project title or saved `.ncanvas` filename.

## 中文

- 改进 Obsidian 运行端的 canvas 右键菜单：菜单操作后、点外部、按 Escape、窗口失焦时都会关闭。
- 移除设置页里失效的文件名 token 下拉框，改为静态显示可用 token。
- 将 Events Sheet 的搜索栏和操作按钮排列调整为接近 Characters 页面。
- 将固定白板入口从 `Sample.canvas` 改为 `Narrative.canvas`，并说明它不会跟随 project title 或保存出来的 `.ncanvas` 文件名变化。

## README / 使用说明

完整说明、截图和使用示例见仓库 README：[English and 中文 README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.3

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
## English

- Fixes the Obsidian launch recursion that could show `Maximum call stack size exceeded` and leave the Narrative Canvas view blank.

## 中文

- 修复 Obsidian 打开 Narrative Canvas 时可能出现 `Maximum call stack size exceeded` 并导致视图空白的问题。

## README / 使用说明
完整说明、截图和使用示例见仓库 README：

[English and 中文 README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.2

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
## English

Narrative Canvas 1.0.1 updates the community plugin release from 1.0.0 with startup, packaging, and review fixes.

### Changes since 1.0.0

- Fixed a plugin-side startup path that could leave the Narrative Canvas view blank after clicking the ribbon icon.
- The canvas app now initializes once inside the plugin host, waits for startup to finish, and shows a visible startup error instead of silently leaving a white view.
- Removed the extra vault-file creation call after opening the view, so a failed startup cannot cascade into more UI errors.
- Addressed CSS lint warnings by replacing unsupported scrollbar declarations, multicolumn layout, extended system font keywords, and `!important` overrides.
- Kept the manifest description compatible with automated review rules.
- Release assets remain the standard community plugin files only: `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css`. The canvas HTML, CSS, and app script are embedded in `main.js` as fallbacks.
- Rechecked empty `characters` and `variables` project states so the Characters and Playbook pages can open without freezing.

## 中文

Narrative Canvas 1.0.1 相比 1.0.0，主要修复插件端启动、打包和社区审核问题。

### 相比 1.0.0 的变化

- 修复点击 ribbon 打开插件后可能出现白屏的启动路径。
- canvas app 在插件 host 内只初始化一次，并等待启动完成；如果启动失败，会显示可见错误，不再只留下空白页面。
- 移除了打开视图后的额外 vault 文件创建调用，避免启动失败后继续触发更多 UI 错误。
- 修复 CSS lint 警告：替换不兼容的 scrollbar 声明、multicolumn 布局、扩展系统字体关键字和 `!important` 覆盖。
- 保持 manifest description 符合自动审核规则。
- Release 资产仍只包含社区插件标准文件：`manifest.json`、`main.js`、`styles.css`。canvas HTML、CSS 和 app script 已作为 fallback 内嵌在 `main.js` 中。
- 复查了空 `characters` 和 `variables` 项目状态，Characters 与 Playbook 页面可以正常打开，不会卡死。

### README / 使用说明

完整说明、截图和使用示例见仓库 README：

[English and 中文 README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.1

releases.author: ringeringeraja33
releases.description:
## English

Narrative Canvas 1.0.0 packages the desktop plugin for visual narrative planning.

### Highlights

- Floating Undo and Redo buttons on the canvas.
- Playbook rule creation works in both the browser app and the desktop runtime.
- Story Focus selects the node, opens the Node inspector, centers the canvas on that node, and uses 50% zoom.
- Events Sheet supports hidden-column restoration from the sticky right column.
- Project files use `.ncanvas`. New files default to `{{project title}}-{{YYYY-MM-DD HHmmss}}.ncanvas`, and file names stay independent from project titles after creation.
- Empty variables and characters are normalized so new or cleared projects do not freeze.
- README updated with usage guidance and screenshots.

### Release assets

- `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css` are the standard community plugin release files.
- `main.js` includes embedded fallbacks for the canvas HTML, canvas CSS, and app script, so the plugin does not require separate `app.js`, `index.html`, or `canvas.css` release assets.

## 中文

Narrative Canvas 1.0.0 打包了桌面端插件，用于可视化规划复杂叙事结构。

### 主要更新

- Canvas 左上角加入悬浮的 Undo 和 Redo 按钮。
- Playbook 的规则创建在网页端和桌面运行端都可以正常使用。
- Story 里的 Focus 会选中节点，打开 Node inspector，把 canvas 移到该节点，并使用 50% 缩放。
- Events Sheet 每张表右侧加入固定的隐藏列恢复区。
- 项目文件使用 `.ncanvas`。新文件默认按 `{{project title}}-{{YYYY-MM-DD HHmmss}}.ncanvas` 命名，创建之后文件名和 project title 互不影响。
- variables 和 characters 为空时会自动补默认数据，避免新建或清空项目后卡死。
- README 已更新使用说明和截图。

### Release 文件

- `manifest.json`、`main.js`、`styles.css` 是社区插件标准 release 文件。
- `main.js` 已内嵌 canvas HTML、canvas CSS 和 app script 的 fallback，所以 release 不需要单独附带 `app.js`、`index.html` 或 `canvas.css`。

### README / 使用说明

完整说明、截图和使用示例见仓库 README：

[English and 中文 README](https://github.com/ringeringeraja33/NarrativeCanvas#readme)
releases.name: Narrative Canvas 1.0.0
